name: Maple Syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-cup glass measure, combine cornstarch, sugar, salt, and cold water.
2. Microwave on 100% power (High) for 2 to 3 minutes, stirring every minute until the syrup is clear and thickened.
3. Stir in the maple flavoring.
4. Allow to cool; refrigerate tightly covered.
Makes 1 cup, serving size 1 tablespoon: 4 calories, 1 gram carbohydrate, 0 grams protein, 0 grams fat.
